description:
The Industry dropdown on Client Details is populated from the Control Panel.
It must contain at least one option once the page loads.
(Lead Details dropdowns such as Sales Rep are in a disabled accordion on
page load and cannot be interacted with until Client Details passes validation.)

steps.name: Go to Add Deal page (New Client mode)
Open MUI Select for ''Industry'' and count options
